title: Cobblemon Classic PC SFX Pack
body:
# Cobblemon Classic PC SFX Pack
With this small resource pack, the Cobblemon PC sound effects will be overhauled.

## **Info**
I edited/used sound effects from Pokémon Red Green Blue Yellow, Pokémon the animated TV series.

## **Showcase 1.21.1 (Cobblemon 1.6)**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ZAhptGkYlNQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## **Known issues:**  
If you spam the "release Pokémon" feature, the release sound effect keeps stacking, which will cause chaos in your ear canals xD.
Also if you spam PC on-off.

## **Dependencies:**
- [Cobblemon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemon)
  
## **To-do**
- _Maybe some small volume tweaks_  

# **Credits:**

_I did not create or do not own any of these sound effects!_\
_All credit goes to the rightful creators/owners!_\
**The pack logo is custom made by me, it's inspired by the RGBY in-game PC.**

_[According to Bulbapedia](https://bulbapedia.bulbagarden.net/wiki/Pok%C3%A9mon_Red_and_Green_Versions#Soundtrack)\
"All of the background music and sound effects used in the games (RGBY), all of which were composed solely by Junichi Masuda. This includes Pokémon cries and Pokédex entries read by "Dexter", Ash's Pokédex."_

[Junichi Masuda](https://bulbapedia.bulbagarden.net/wiki/Junichi_Masuda)\
[Game Freak, Inc.](https://bulbapedia.bulbagarden.net/wiki/Game_Freak)\
[The Pokémon Company](https://bulbapedia.bulbagarden.net/wiki/The_Pok%C3%A9mon_Company)\
[Nintendo](https://bulbapedia.bulbagarden.net/wiki/Nintendo)
